🔧 Admin Sync Tools

Use these if data looks out of sync between devices. "Force Sync Now" pulls and pushes latest data. "Factory Reset" wipes ALL data on this device AND the cloud — use only to start completely fresh.

Check In

Face Photo Verification

Select employee to compare saved photo with live selfie.

Browser HTML cannot reliably do full face recognition without a face-recognition library/server, so this mode captures live selfie + GPS and lets admin confirm the matched employee. Worker checkout remains only for their own login.

📱 Send via WhatsApp
How it works:
• Tap Open WhatsApp → opens the WhatsApp app with this contact and message pre-filled.
• If WhatsApp doesn't open (preview/in-app browser), tap Copy Both, open WhatsApp manually, paste, and send.
